title: Thrantcill
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Thrantcills''' were flying animals that evolved on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] around [[100,000 BBY/Legends|100,000 BBY]]. They had hooked beaks, flat black eyes, lived in flocks, and flew in diamond formation. Every winter they flew to the planet's southern regions.

Thrantcill pâté was a food enjoyed by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]]
